metadata.name: New Module
metadata.author: Unknown
metadata.description: A creeping corruption poisons the rivers and fields. Find the purification stones in the dungeons and cleanse the sacred fountain in Ravenvale.

key_dungeons.name: Obsidian Warren
key_dungeons.description: Thick vines choke the mouth of Obsidian Warren. Beyond them, torchlight flickers in the gloom.
key_dungeons.quest_objective: Explore Obsidian Warren and recover the lost Crystal Key
key_dungeons.quest_hint: The artifact was hidden here long ago by a forgotten order.
